default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To introduce and explain the simulation assignment for creating a publication pitch for a client.](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Assignment simulates pitching a new publication to a client, incorporating research, strategy, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Due next Thursday; utilize provided tools/workflows and focus on polished, client-ready presentation](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Key distinction: Content should build brand authority, not be direct marketing/sales material](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Joseph available as peer resource for questions on tooling/workflows](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2153.0)

## Topics

### Assignment Overview

  - [Simulates pitching new publication to client (not tied to current work streams)](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Tasks: Research client, define publication identity, write editorial manifesto, create sample article](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Use provided tooling/workflows; expect to refine outputs](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Client-facing presentation - polish and completeness important](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Focus on brand-building content, not direct marketing](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

### Example Walkthrough

  - [Reviewed sample submission with strong formatting](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Key components: Company overview, audience definition, voice/tone, competitive edge](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Editorial manifesto outlines publication concept](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Calibration article demonstrates content approach](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Logistics

  - [Due next Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)
  - [Can choose any company, including current clients](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)
  - [Client info available in Notion Clients Database](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)
  - [Joseph (experienced contractor) available as peer resource](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)

### Feedback Process

  - [This is 2nd cohort doing assignment](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Team will review submissions and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Participants will be asked for feedback to improve future iterations](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review assignment details and Marcel's walkthrough video](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Choose company to focus on](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [Complete assignment by next Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)
  - [Reach out to Mariana for logistical questions, Matthew for conceptual questions](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Utilize Joseph as peer resource for workflow/tooling questions](https://fathom.video/share/mq39wJVUrzz-YspFz2xse6hs1ZvzSz4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2169.0)
